title: amelanchier × neglecta
intro: Amelanchier × neglecta, also known as the Serviceberry or Juneberry, is a hybrid plant species that is a cross between Amelanchier canadensis and Amelanchier alnifolia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain anthocyanins and other flavonoids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amelanchier × neglecta berries include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, cancer, and cognitive decline, as well as supporting eye health and immune function. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
